motto: Immediate home protector — everything within ~1 acre of your airspace, WiFi and wire. Block unauthorized entry through lawful means.

block_means.wifi: FCC lawful kick — disconnect, forever-disable BSSID, firewall + autokill if IP correlated. No jamming.
block_means.lan_ip: Firewall block in+out, field attack kit disable, neighbor wire isolation when LAN.
block_means.arp: Firewall block peer, trust refusal, pest eradication if hostile process linked.
